member.name: T:itolib.Behaviours.Detectors.DetectRegion`1
member.summary: Represents an abstract region within which to detect or perform a search for Collider objects with an attached Behaviour of type , which are then fed to various event callbacks.
member.remarks: NOTE: Region needs to be either a BoxCollider, SphereCollider, or CapsuleCollider to perform searches.

member.name: P:itolib.Behaviours.Detectors.DetectRegion`1.ActivationSelf
member.summary: Cached instance of the current DetectRegion as an IActivationScript, to avoid having to cast.

member.name: P:itolib.Behaviours.Detectors.DetectRegion`1.PerformedActivation
member.summary: Whether activation has already been performed or not.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Detectors.DetectRegion`1.regionCollider
member.summary: Collider whose bounds are to be used when searching for overlapping objects.
member.remarks: NOTE: Region needs to be either a BoxCollider, SphereCollider, or CapsuleCollider to perform searches.

member.name: P:itolib.Behaviours.Detectors.DetectRegion`1.ActivationTime
member.summary: Desired ActivationTime for the region's automatic object search.
member.remarks: NOTE: Can be set to Manual to disable the automatic search, but is not required for triggering manual searches afterwards.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Detectors.DetectRegion`1.maxObjects
member.summary: Maximum number of Collider instances expected to be found per search by this DetectRegion, for memory allocation purposes. Can be set to 0 to disable object searching.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Detectors.DetectRegion`1.onRegionChecked
member.summary: Callback invoked after a search is performed, with the total number of overlapping Collider instances found given as a parameter.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Detectors.DetectRegion`1.onRegionEntered
member.summary: Callback invoked when an object of type enters the region, with the object itself given as a parameter.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Detectors.DetectRegion`1.onRegionExited
member.summary: Callback invoked when an object of type exits the region, with the object itself given as a parameter.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Detectors.DetectRegion`1.onObjectsEach
member.summary: Callback invoked sequentially on every object of type found within the region after a search is performed, with each object given as a parameter.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Detectors.DetectRegion`1.onObjectsAny
member.summary: Callback invoked after a search is performed, only if at least one object of type is found within the region, with the total number of overlapping objects given as a parameter.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Detectors.DetectRegion`1.layerMask
member.summary: Layers within which to search for overlapping objects of type .

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Detectors.DetectRegion`1.overlapBuffer
member.summary: Pre-allocated Collider array of a specified size (), containing objects of type overlapping this DetectRegion.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Detectors.DetectRegion`1.objectsFound
member.summary: Total number of Collider instances found by the last search performed by this DetectRegion, regardless of whether or not they are of type .

member.name: M:itolib.Behaviours.Detectors.DetectRegion`1.Reset
member.summary: Define default values for this DetectRegion.
member.remarks: Meant for defining a default LayerMask value (), tailored to the specific type of object to find.

member.name: M:itolib.Behaviours.Detectors.DetectRegion`1.OnNetworkSpawn
member.summary: Perform search or subscribe to a specific event, depending on the set ActivationTime.

member.name: M:itolib.Behaviours.Detectors.DetectRegion`1.OnTriggerEnter(UnityEngine.Collider)
member.summary: Listener called when any Collider enters the region.
member.param: Collider that entered the region.

member.name: M:itolib.Behaviours.Detectors.DetectRegion`1.OnTriggerExit(UnityEngine.Collider)
member.summary: Listener called when any Collider exits the region.
member.param: Collider that exited the region.

member.name: M:itolib.Behaviours.Detectors.DetectRegion`1.CheckObjectsInRegion
member.summary: Perform a non-allocating search within the defined region (), and store any found Collider instances into the overlap buffer ().

member.summary: Perform script activation at the specified ActivationTime.
member.param: ActivationTime set for the script.

member.name: P:itolib.Behaviours.Helpers.RandomVector.SeededSelf
member.summary: Cached instance of the current RandomVector as an ISeededScript, to avoid having to cast.

member.name: T:itolib.Behaviours.Helpers.SpecificDoorway
member.summary: A Doorway with some added functionality, such as being able to specify if it's an Entrance or Exit to define more than one per Tile.
member.remarks: NOTE: The first Doorway to generate in a Dungeon MUST be a SpecificDoorway, in order for them to work as intended.

member.name: P:itolib.Behaviours.Helpers.SpecificDoorway.DoorwayType
member.summary: Specific type of Doorway this should generate as.
member.remarks: NOTE: The first Doorway to generate in a Dungeon MUST be a SpecificDoorway, in order for them to work as intended.

member.name: P:itolib.Behaviours.Helpers.SpecificDoorway.AllowSwap
member.summary: Whether to allow swapping Doorway entrances and exits or not.

member.name: P:itolib.Behaviours.Helpers.SpecificDoorway.WeightOverride
member.summary: Override the Doorway's calculated weight for being chosen for a path.

member.name: P:itolib.Behaviours.Helpers.SpecificDoorway.WeightMultiplier
member.summary: Apply a multiplier to the Doorway's calculated weight (or its override).

member.name: P:itolib.Behaviours.Helpers.SpecificDoorway.DoorwayTagConnectionMode
member.summary: Mode in which this SpecificDoorway should handle connecting to any Doorway with a matching Tag.

member.name: P:itolib.Behaviours.Helpers.SpecificDoorway.DoorwayConnectionTags
member.summary: List of every Tag to search for when selecting a Doorway to connect to.
member.remarks: NOTE: Only a single Tag needs to match, not all.

member.name: M:itolib.Behaviours.Helpers.SpecificDoorway.Reset
member.summary: Copy over configuration from an existing Doorway, to replace them easily.

member.name: T:itolib.Behaviours.Interactables.InteractClimbable
member.summary: Represents a ladder with customizable climbing speed.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Interactables.InteractClimbable.climbSpeed
member.summary: The climbing speed to set when using this specific ladder.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Interactables.InteractClimbable.normalClimbSpeed
member.summary: The player's regular climbing speed, to reset their climbing speed after they get off the ladder.

member.name: M:itolib.Behaviours.Interactables.InteractClimbable.Reset
member.remarks: NOTE: Still need to set the Transform points for the InteractTrigger, but the settings here are in default vanilla ladders.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Interactables.InteractPurchasable.onPurchase
member.summary: Callback invoked when a transaction is complete but the object has not yet been spawned.

member.name: M:itolib.Behaviours.Interactables.InteractPurchasable.RequestPurchaseRpc(Unity.Netcode.RpcParams)
member.summary: Attempt to purchase and spawn instance of the purchasable object.

member.summary: Send a notification message to a specific player.
member.param: Price of the purchasable object.
Whether or not the purchase was succesful.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Interactables.InteractSeatable.actionToExit
member.summary: Action required for the player to stop sitting down. See 'UnityEngine.InputSystem.Key' for number values.

member.name: T:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlatformGrabbable
member.summary: Represents a platform players can grab and hold on to.
member.remarks: Intended for stuff like swinging bars, ziplines, or anything that needs to transport the player somewhere.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlatformGrabbable.grabSpeed
member.summary: Ramping speed for moving the attached player towards the target position.
member.remarks: If left at 0, the player will be immediately moved to the target position without any smoothing.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlatformGrabbable.playerOffset
member.summary: Offset to apply to the player's position while grabbing on to the platform.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlatformGrabbable.actionToHold
member.summary: PlayerAction required to be held for the player to hang on to the platform. See PlayerActions.MovementActions for a list of valid player actions.
member.remarks: Leaving it blank allows players to remain attached without holding anything, until being detached through other means (e.g. detachTimer).

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlatformGrabbable.allowTwoHanded
member.summary: Whether to allow players to carry two-handed items while grabbing on to the platform or not.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlatformGrabbable.detachOnEnemyCollision
member.summary: Whether to detach the player if an enemy collides with the platform or not.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlatformGrabbable.detachOnWallCollision
member.summary: Whether to detach the player if the platform collides with a wall or not.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlatformGrabbable.detachOnSpecialAnimation
member.summary: Whether to detach the player if the player enters a special animation or not.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlatformGrabbable.playerAction
member.summary: Cached reference to the player action to be held in order to remain attached to the platform.

member.name: M:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlatformGrabbable.AttachCondition(GameNetcodeStuff.PlayerControllerB)
member.summary: Attach if the player is alive, not holding a two-handed item (allowTwoHanded), and the player action is being held (playerAction).
member.param: Player to check for attaching.
member.returns: Whether the player should attach or not.

member.name: M:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlatformGrabbable.DetachCondition(GameNetcodeStuff.PlayerControllerB)
member.summary: Detach if the player is dead, collides with an enemy (detachOnEnemyCollision), enters a special animation (detachOnSpecialAnimation), or stops holding the player action (playerAction).
member.param: Player to check for detaching.
member.returns: Whether the player should detach or not.

member.name: M:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlatformGrabbable.Update
member.summary: Handle transporting player who is attached to the platform.

member.name: M:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlatformGrabbable.OnTriggerEnter(UnityEngine.Collider)
member.summary: Handle platform collisions checks to detach player, for detachOnEnemyCollision and detachOnWallCollision.
member.param: Collider to check.

member.name: T:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.LaunchParameters
member.summary: Represents a force to be applied to the player, towards a specified direction.

member.summary: Magnitude of the force to apply to the player.

member.summary: Direction of the force to apply to the player.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.LaunchParameters.considerRotationFrom
member.summary: Additional rotation source to consider when multiplying by the specified direction.

member.name: M:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.LaunchParameters.#ctor
member.summary: Constructor for the struct type (needed to allow default parameter values).

member.name: T:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerLauncher
member.summary: Represents a launcher that can apply one or several forces to a player to move them around.
member.remarks: Intended for stuff like cannons, trampolines, or any obstacle that knocks the player back a certain distance.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerLauncher.jumpingBoolID
member.summary: Hash of the bool parameter for a player jumping.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerLauncher.forcesToApply
member.summary: List of forces to apply to the attached player.
member.remarks: If multiple forces are specified, they are all combined and applied in unison.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerLauncher.launchSpeed
member.summary: Ramping speed for the forces applied to the attached player.
member.remarks: If left at 0, the forces will be fully applied instantly without any smoothing.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerLauncher.detachOnLand
member.summary: Whether the attached player should detach upon touching the ground or not.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerLauncher.detachOnPeak
member.summary: Whether the attached player should detach as soon as the full force is applied or not.
member.remarks: NOTE: Requires launchSpeed to be greater than 0.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerLauncher.negateFallDamage
member.summary: Whether the attached player should take fall damage or not, as long as they're attached.
member.remarks: NOTE: Fall damage will apply if detached before landing.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerLauncher.disableMovement
member.summary: Whether the attached player should be allowed to move while being launched or not.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerLauncher.lockCamera
member.summary: Whether the attached player should be allowed to move their camera while being launched or not.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerLauncher.crouchingPreventsLaunch
member.summary: Whether crouching should prevent the player from attaching or not.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerLauncher.rocketJump
member.summary: Whether the player should be able to perform a 'rocket jump', if jumping immediately before attaching.
member.remarks: NOTE: Enabled by default as a joke, but should probably be disabled in most cases.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerLauncher.dropPlayerItemsAtStart
member.summary: Whether players should drop all their items immediately upon attaching or not.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerLauncher.dropPlayerItemsAtEnd
member.summary: Whether players should drop all their items immediately upon detaching or not.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerLauncher.dropHeldItemAtStart
member.summary: Whether players should drop their held item immediately upon attaching or not.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerLauncher.dropHeldItemAtEnd
member.summary: Whether players should drop their held item immediately upon detaching or not.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerLauncher.rotateCamera
member.summary: Whether to rotate the player model towards the specified targetAngle or not.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerLauncher.rotationSpeed
member.summary: Ramping speed for the player model rotation towards the specified targetAngle.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerLauncher.targetAngle
member.summary: Target rotation for the player model, in degrees.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerLauncher.clampAngle
member.summary: Whether the shortest path towards the targetAngle should be prioritized or not.
member.remarks: Disabling clamping allows for >360° rotation (full spins).

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerLauncher.playerModelTransform
member.summary: Cached Transform of the currently attached player's model.

member.summary: Time passed since the player was launched.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerLauncher.targetForce
member.summary: Cumulative force between all the forces to apply, to smoothly ramp towards.

member.summary: Attach if the player is alive and not crouching (crouchingPreventsLaunch).
member.param: Player to check for attaching.
member.returns: Whether the player should attach or not.

member.summary: Detach if the player is dead, touches the ground (detachOnLand), or the full force has just been applied (detachOnPeak).
member.param: Player to check for detaching.
member.returns: Whether the player should detach or not.

member.summary: Ramp up towards the target force, smoothly rotate player model transform, and/or continually set the player as no longer taking fall damage.

member.summary: Attach player on the local client.

member.summary: Detach player on the local client.

member.name: T:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerSeater
member.summary: Represents a surface upon which attaching players may rest their rear, should they need a short break.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerSeater.stopAnimationID
member.summary: Hash of the trigger parameter to activate to reset the player's animations.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerSeater.crouchingID
member.summary: Hash of the bool parameter to toggle the player's crouching animation.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerSeater.notInSpecialAnimTag
member.summary: Hash of the tag to check if the player is currently not in a special animation (sitting down).

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerSeater.seatPosition
member.summary: Position and rotation to be used for sitting players.
member.remarks: If left empty, the Transform of the object this component is attached to will be used.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerSeater.actionToUnseat
member.summary: PlayerAction required to be held for the player to unseat. See PlayerActions.MovementActions for a list of valid player actions.
member.remarks: Leaving it blank prevents the player from leaving their seat on their own, so they must be detached through other means (e.g. detachTimer).

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerSeater.sittingAnimation
member.summary: Trigger parameter to activate in the attaching player's Animator in order to enter a sitting animation.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerSeater.hidePlayerItem
member.summary: Whether to hide the sitting player's held item or not.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerSeater.enterVehicleAnimation
member.summary: Whether to toggle the sitting player's inVehicleAnimation field or not.
member.remarks: NOTE: NOT required for the player to sit down, and having it enabled disables player position syncing with other clients.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerSeater.cameraTurnSpeed
member.summary: Ramping speed for the sitting player rotating towards the seat's rotation.
member.remarks: If left at 0, the player will not be rotated when sitting down and will remain facing the direction they were looking towards.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerSeater.cameraClamping
member.summary: Whether the sitting player's camera should be clamped between specified angles or not.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerSeater.minVerticalClamp
member.summary: Minimum vertical value for the player's camera clamp, in degrees.
member.remarks: Defines how far down the sitting player will be able to look.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerSeater.maxVerticalClamp
member.summary: Maximum vertical value for the player's camera clamp, in degrees.
member.remarks: Defines how far up the sitting player will be able to look.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Kinematics.PlayerSeater.horizontalClamp
member.summary: Horizontal value for the player's camera clamp, in degrees.
member.remarks: Defines how far to the sides the sitting player will be able to look.

member.name: T:itolib.Behaviours.Networking.PlayerAttachable
member.summary: Represents an effect or concept that continually affects a player (attach), and eventually stops (detach).

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Networking.PlayerAttachable.onAttach
member.summary: Callback invoked immediately after a player attaches, with the player in question as parameter.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Networking.PlayerAttachable.triggerOnce
member.summary: Whether players can attach multiple times to the same object or not.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Networking.PlayerAttachable.attachOnEnter
member.summary: Whether players automatically attach upon entering the attach region or not.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Networking.PlayerAttachable.onDetach
member.summary: Callback invoked immediately before a player detaches, with the player in question as parameter.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Networking.PlayerAttachable.detachTimer
member.summary: Delay in seconds until the player is forcibly detached. Can be left at 0 to attach to the player for an indefinite amount of time.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Networking.PlayerAttachable.detachOnExit
member.summary: Whether players automatically detach upon leaving the attach region or not.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Networking.PlayerAttachable.parentNetworkObject
member.summary: Parent NetworkObject to attempt to despawn once detached, if set to despawn upon detaching.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Networking.PlayerAttachable.despawnOnDetach
member.summary: Whether the specified parent NetworkObject should despawn after the player detaches or not.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Networking.PlayerAttachable.despawnTimer
member.summary: Delay in seconds until despawning after detaching the player, to allow effects to play.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Networking.PlayerAttachable.attachLocally
member.summary: Whether players attach locally or not, otherwise only one player can attach at a time.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Networking.PlayerAttachable.attachedPlayerTransform
member.summary: Cached Transform of the currently attached player (if there is one).

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Networking.PlayerAttachable.attachedPlayerCameraTransform
member.summary: Cached Transform of the currently attached player's camera (if there is one).

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Networking.PlayerAttachable.localPlayerAttached
member.summary: Whether or not the local player is attached.

member.name: F:itolib.Behaviours.Networking.PlayerAttachable.attachDisabled
member.summary: Whether players should be able to attach or not, acting as a kill switch of sorts.

member.summary: Define any specific default values that should be applied for an inheriting script.

member.returns: Whether the player should detach or not.

member.name: T:itolib.Enums.DoorwayType
member.summary: Types of Doorway that can be set for a SpecificDoorway component.

member.name: F:itolib.Enums.DoorwayType.Unspecified
member.summary: No specified type for this SpecificDoorway, meaning it can be chosen as an entrance, exit, or neither (branch path).

member.name: F:itolib.Enums.DoorwayType.Entrance
member.summary: An entrance to the Tile, meaning the path is eligible to generate through this SpecificDoorway and into the Tile.

member.name: F:itolib.Enums.DoorwayType.Exit
member.summary: An exit to the Tile, meaning the path is eligible to generate past this SpecificDoorway and out of the Tile.

member.name: F:itolib.Enums.DoorwayType.Neither
member.summary: Neither an entrance nor an exit to the Tile, meaning only branch paths are eligible to generate past this SpecificDoorway.

member.name: T:itolib.Interfaces.IPooledObject`1
member.summary: Adds object pooling capabilities to any implementing class, which also becomes its own LinkedList that holds all its instances. Contains some default implementations for assigning and freeing instances.
member.typeparam: The type of the object taking ownership of this pooled object instance.
member.remarks: Not me only finding out UnityEngine.Pool.IObjectPool exists right after implementing this... 💀

member.name: P:itolib.Interfaces.IPooledObject`1.ObjectID
member.summary: Instance number for the current object in the pool. Intended for tracking and/or limiting the amount of created instances.

member.name: P:itolib.Interfaces.IPooledObject`1.TakenBy
member.summary: External that has taken 'ownership' of this pooled object instance.

member.name: P:itolib.Interfaces.IPooledObject`1.NextPooledObject
member.summary: Next pooled object instance in the LinkedList.

member.name: M:itolib.Interfaces.IPooledObject`1.CreateInstance
member.summary: Instantiates a new pooled object instance.
member.remarks: Intended for doing any kind of extra initialization, or for setting additional properties.
member.returns: The newly-created pooled object instance.

member.name: M:itolib.Interfaces.IPooledObject`1.TryAssignInstance(`0,System.Int32,itolib.Interfaces.IPooledObject{`0}@)
member.summary: Attempt to assign a given to a new or existing pooled object instance.
member.param: External attempting to grab a pooled object instance.
Maximum number of pooled object instances that can be created.
The assigned pooled object instance, if successful.
member.returns: Whether a pooled object instance was successfully assigned or not.

member.name: M:itolib.Interfaces.IPooledObject`1.TryFreeInstance(`0,itolib.Interfaces.IPooledObject{`0}@)
member.summary: Check if a given is assigned to a pooled object instance, and free that instance to be reused.
member.param: External that might be assigned to a pooled object instance.
The now-freed pooled object instance, if successful.
member.returns: Whether a pooled object instance was successfully freed or not.

member.name: M:itolib.Interfaces.IPooledObject`1.PrepareInstances(System.Int32)
member.summary: Instantiates multiple instances of the pooled object, to have prepared.
member.param: The number of instances left to prepare.

member.name: T:itolib.Interfaces.ISeededScript`1
member.summary: Adds seeded randomness capabilities to any implementing class, using the current round's map seed.
member.typeparam: The seeded object itself, with which to generate a unique seed (derived from the map seed).
member.remarks: Handles automatically initializing a new, unique Random instance for each implementing class upon starting a new round.

member.name: P:itolib.Interfaces.ISeededScript`1.SeededSelf
member.summary: Cached instance of the implementing script as an ISeededScript, to avoid having to cast.

member.name: P:itolib.Interfaces.ISeededScript`1.SeededRandom
member.summary: Obtain a seeded Random instance initialized using a seed derived from the current map seed.

member.name: P:itolib.Interfaces.ISeededScript`1.SeedOffset
member.summary: A set value to add to the current map seed, either specified or generated by hashing .

member.name: M:itolib.Interfaces.ISeededScript`1.ComputeSeedOffset
member.summary: Generate a unique integer for the implementing class, using a SHA256 hash of 's name.
member.returns: The unique value to use as a seed offset for the implementing class' seeded Random instance.

member.name: M:itolib.Interfaces.ISeededScript`1.ResetRandom
member.summary: Clear the implementing class' seeded Random instance, to generate a new one.

member.name: M:itolib.Interfaces.ISeededScript`1.GetSeededRandom
member.summary: Obtain a reference to the static seeded Random instance of the implementing class.
member.remarks: Intended to avoid having to call ISeededScript <>.SeededRandom statically.
member.returns: The implementing class' seeded Random instance.
